picks.quote: I got so far on the money line there... I just think that Safar is going to be a little bit pow- a little bit more power, a little bit more active, a little bit more volume. He's the A side. I think he's going to edge a decision.
Will he beat Ryan? I don't think so... I just think Ryan's speed, power, his skill set it should be enough to beat Conor Benn.

I got Catterall on the money line and on points... I think Jack's sharper. I think his backhand's better. I think his overall fight experience is going to be enough to to get him to where he wants to go.
I think Mizuki's on a different level though... I don't think she beats Mizuki, though.

I think Kiki Torres is a potential future world champ... I think that speed and volume is going to drown Sanchez. I think he stops him. I got Torres on the money line. Yeah, I'm playing the stoppage, dude, plus 120.
Hamzah Sheeraz, I think Sheeraz stops Bajic... Hamzah on the money line not playable. Hamzah by knockout.
I think Samake be I rate Samake. Young Buck, still you know, by no means a finished product, still green, but I rate him and I think he's one to watch out for.
And then Usyk versus Verhoeven, I got a prop here. Um I like Usyk 1-6... Usyk should get the guy out of there. Yeah.

But as we get closer and closer, I'm leaning more and more and more to Jaron... I just think there's too many variables for Zander's eyes to overcome. I don't think Zander does anything I don't think Zander does one thing exceptionally better than Jarrell.
I smashed Tim Tszyu at plus 145. I already have action. I cannot believe Tszyu is the underdog... I'm picking Tim Zuu to win and I think we're going to win money.
Yuri Sedeno versus Jahi Tucker. I'm going Sedeno, dude.
